entries.source: "Is social media harmful?"
entries.value: "Ali so družbena omrežja škodljiva?"

entries.source: "Is space exploration worth it?"
entries.value: "Ali je raziskovanje vesolja vredno truda?"

entries.source: "Should homework exist?"
entries.value: "Ali naj domače naloge obstajajo?"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Debate any topic on inspir for argument learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Praktični vodnik za uporabo Debate any topic na inspir za argumentacijsko učenje, s pozivi, učnimi zankami in varnejšimi navadami pri UI.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: Jača studijska petlja

entries.source: AI Debate Coach For Sharper Arguments is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Pick any topic and go head-to-head in a real debate. Choose a side, get challenged, and learn to make better arguments.
entries.value: UI Debate Trener za oštre argumente je fokusiran način za uporaba UI za učenje umjesto pasivne kolekcije odgovora. Način je izgradžen oko odredženog posla: Odaberite bilo koju temu in iči glavu na glavu v pravoj raspravi. Odaberite stranu, dobiti izazov, in naučiti napraviti bolje argumente.

entries.source: AI Debate Coach For Sharper Arguments: practical guide
entries.value: AI Debate Coach For Sharper Arguments: praktični vodnik

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: UI učitelj

entries.source: Answer counterarguments.
entries.value: Odgovorite na protuargumente.

entries.source: Argument
entries.value: Argumentacija

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Traži mali prvi korak, a ne končni odgovor.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Vprašajte UI da preverite svoje razmišljanje, a ne samo rezultat.

entries.source: Choose a side.
entries.value: Izaberite stranu.

entries.source: Debate any topic
entries.value: Debata o katerikoli temi

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Završite pisanjem ideje iz memorije.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Traži da pokušate

entries.source: Start the live mode at Debate any topic. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Explain My Answer. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Pokrenite način života na debati bilo koju temu. Ako želite susjedni oblik učenja, pokušajte razložiti moj odgovor. Za širi pogled na platformu pročitajte kar UI učeči pratilac treba učiniti za svakoga.

entries.source: Strengthen weak claims.
entries.value: Ojačaj slabe trditve.

entries.source: Students, debaters, writers, and curious learners who want stronger reasoning.
entries.value: Študenti, debaterji, pisci in radovedni učenci, ki želijo močnejše sklepanje.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Recite načinu rada kar pokušavate naučiti ali proizvesti.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Ta se razlika pojavljuje v protoku. Umjesto jedne divovske reakcije, najbolje seje kreču kroz petlju: postaviti cilj, pokušati nekar, dobiti povratne informacije, popraviti slabu točku, in odabrati sljedeču akciju.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: To je važno. Opčenito chatbot lahko odgovoriti gotovo na sve, ali način učenja daje razgovor oblik. To vas potiče prema vrsti razmišljanja, prakse, povratne informacije, ali raziščivanja ki pomaže ideja štap.

entries.source: The coach pushes one strong counterargument at a time and tracks the claims that matter.
entries.value: Trener poda en močan protiargument naenkrat in spremlja trditve, ki so pomembne.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: To je ista navika za proučavanje z UI bez varanja: zadržati učenca aktivan. UI je najkorisniji ko vam daje povratnu informaciju o vašem razmišljanju.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Ovaj način rada posebno je koristen za učence ki žele:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Pokušajte korak v svojim riječima.

entries.source: Use Debate any topic when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Uporabi Debate any topic, ko želiš sejo, ki se začne hitro, a se ti še vedno prilagodi. Prvi cilj ni zveneti impresivno. Prvi cilj je, da se naslednji korak zdi izvedljiv.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: S čime ta način rada pomaže

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Gdje iči sljedeče

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Lahko takodžer začeti z grubom verzijom vašeg pravog problema. Neuredan prvi prompt je v redu. Sekcija lahko pojasniti razinu, publiku, rok, in stil nakon kar počnete.
